examples: When a petrol station burns down, you don't just want to know who dropped the cigarette; you want to know why all the combustible fumes escaped.
The inner envelope filled with helium in the head section of the blimp and the third built-in airbag at the tail is filled with ethane combustible gas.
The ability of coal to release a combustible gas has long been known.
The Koran controversy in the United States has added further fuel to a combustible mix.
Most of Ethiopia's 7m pastoralists are Muslim and the parched lands they roam are particularly combustible.
